title: High Angle Editorial Street Style Photograph Taken
sourceTitle: High Angle Editorial Street Style Photograph Taken

imagePrompts.prompt:
High-angle editorial street-style photograph, taken from a balcony or upper-floor viewpoint looking down at a stylish young woman standing on sunlit asphalt. Composition: subject centered slightly left, full body visible, with lots of negative space around her; the right edge shows the front corner of a glossy black boxy luxury SUV with a round headlight and horizontal chrome grille cropped into frame. Ground details include rough grey asphalt with faint tire scuffs and dust, a diagonal strip of small cobblestones near the top of the frame, and soft tree-branch shadows cast across the road.

Subject: young adult woman with light skin, relaxed confident expression, looking up toward the camera. She wears a brown baseball cap with white embroidered monogram letters, chunky black rectangular sunglasses, an oversized black leather jacket with visible tan contrast stitching and wide lapels, a white open-collar shirt underneath slightly unbuttoned, a beige knit V-neck buttoned vest/cardigan with four buttons, very wide grey pleated trousers, and white shoes with dark toe detail. Pose: left hand holding a white takeaway coffee cup with lid and beige sleeve, right hand raised naturally touching the side of her cap or sunglasses.

Lighting: warm late-afternoon sunlight coming from the upper left, creating crisp highlights on the leather jacket and SUV paint with natural shadows and gentle falloff. Color grading features warm cinematic browns and greys, slightly desaturated tones, subtle film grain, sharp focus on the subject with mild background softness, realistic textures, no extra people, and no text.
